basic_details.job_title: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Para Pump Operators, Multipurpose Workers and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Para Pump Operators, Multipurpose Workers and More
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Pump Operators, Multipurpose Workers and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag. A total of 30 vacancies have been announced through the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Pump Operators, Multipurpose Workers and More Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: Last Date for Application Submission: 18 July 2026 (up to 5:00 PM) Cut-off Date for Age, Qualification & Experience: 18 July 2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Below 45 years

qualification.details: Qualification (Para Pump Operator / Para Fitter): Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in relevant trade (Electrician, Wireman, Diesel Mechanic, Pump Mechanic, Fitter, Plumber etc.) from recognized ITI or under Skill Development Scheme. Qualification (Multipurpose Worker): Middle Pass (8th) from a recognized school. 8th standard mark sheet is mandatory. Experience: Desirable - Experience in JSV / HPPWD / CPWD / PSUs or outsourcing agency in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag.

salary_details.details: Para Pump Operator: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Para Fitter: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Multipurpose Worker: Rs. 6000/- Per Month Part-time engagement (6 working hours per day)

selection_process: Scrutiny of documents Skill Test / Physical Test Initial seniority as per notified criteria
how_to_apply: Submit application on prescribed proforma in the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division Jawalamukhi on any working day from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM up to 18.07.2026 along with attested/self-attested copies of all required documents (Age proof, Educational/Technical qualifications, Bonafide Himachali, Character Certificate, Experience, Caste/Category, EWS, BPL etc.).
important_instructions: Applications received after 18.07.2026 or incomplete will be rejected. Submit separate application for each post. Category certificate mandatory for reservation benefit. Original certificates will be verified at the time of evaluation. Number of posts can be increased or decreased as per government orders.

content_sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification (Para Pump Operator / Para Fitter): Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in relevant trade (Electrician, Wireman, Diesel Mechanic, Pump Mechanic, Fitter, Plumber etc.) from recognized ITI or under Skill Development Scheme. Qualification (Multipurpose Worker): Middle Pass (8th) from a recognized school. 8th standard mark sheet is mandatory. Experience: Desirable - Experience in JSV / HPPWD / CPWD / PSUs or outsourcing agency in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag.

content_sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Para Pump Operator: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Para Fitter: Rs. 7100/- Per Month Multipurpose Worker: Rs. 6000/- Per Month Part-time engagement (6 working hours per day)

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Below 45 years

Original certificates will be verified at the time of evaluation. Number of posts can be increased or decreased as per government orders.

content_sections.text: Submit application on prescribed proforma in the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division Jawalamukhi on any working day from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM up to 18.07.2026 along with attested/self-attested copies of all required documents (Age proof, Educational/Technical qualifications, Bonafide Himachali, Character Certificate, Experience, Caste/Category, EWS, BPL etc.).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date is 18 July 2026 up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there?
faq.answer: Total 30 posts (08 Para Pump Operator + 02 Para Fitter + 20 Multipurpose Worker).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary?
faq.answer: Rs. 7100/- for Para Pump Operator & Para Fitter and Rs. 6000/- for Multipurpose Worker per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification?
faq.answer: Matriculation + ITI for technical posts and Middle Pass for Multipurpose Worker.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit?
faq.answer: 18 to below 45 years as on 18 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee?
